entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: हामी यो site मा संशोधित terms post गरेर कुनै पनि समयमा Terms संशोधन गर्न सक्छौं। यी Terms समय-समयमा समीक्षा गर्नु तपाईंको जिम्मेवारी हो। revised Terms post भएपछि Platform को निरन्तर प्रयोगले तपाईंले परिवर्तनहरू स्वीकार र सहमति जनाएको जनाउँछ। परिवर्तनहरू तपाईंमा binding हुने भएकाले तपाईंले यो page बारम्बार जाँच गर्नु अपेक्षित छ। कुनै revision लागू भएपछि हाम्रो Service पहुँच वा प्रयोग जारी राख्दा, तपाईं revised terms द्वारा bound हुन सहमत हुनुहुन्छ। नयाँ terms मा सहमत हुनुहुन्न भने तपाईं Service प्रयोग गर्न अब authorized हुनुहुन्न।

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: हामीले collect गरेको वा तपाईंले प्रदान गरेको personal information खुलासा गर्न सक्छौं: Law Enforcement का लागि disclosure: केही परिस्थितिमा, कानूनले मागेमा वा public authorities का valid requests का प्रत्युत्तरमा हामी तपाईंको Data खुलासा गर्न बाध्य हुन सक्छौं। Business Transaction: हाम्रो subsidiaries वा हामी merger, acquisition, वा asset sale मा संलग्न भएमा तपाईंको Personal Data transfer हुन सक्छ। अन्य अवस्थाहरू: हामी तपाईंको information पनि खुलासा गर्न सक्छौं: हाम्रो subsidiaries र affiliates लाई; हाम्रो business support गर्न प्रयोग गर्ने contractors, service providers, र अन्य third parties लाई; तपाईंले दिएको purpose पूरा गर्न; हाम्रो website मा तपाईंको company logo समावेश गर्न; तपाईंले information दिँदा हामीले disclosed गरेको अन्य कुनै purpose का लागि; तपाईंको consent सहित अन्य कुनै अवस्थामा; वा Company, हाम्रा customers, वा अरूहरूको rights, property, वा safety protect गर्न disclosure आवश्यक वा उपयुक्त छ भन्ने हामीलाई लागेमा।

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: हामी हाम्रो Service सहज बनाउन, हाम्रो behalf मा Service प्रदान गर्न, Service-related services गर्न, वा हाम्रो Service कसरी प्रयोग हुन्छ भनेर analyze गर्न third party companies र individuals (“Service Providers”) नियुक्त गर्न सक्छौं। यी third parties लाई हाम्रो behalf मा यी tasks गर्न मात्र तपाईंको Personal Data मा access हुन्छ र अरू कुनै purpose का लागि यसलाई disclose वा use नगर्न बाध्य हुन्छन्।

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: हामी Service भित्र paid products र/वा services प्रदान गर्न सक्छौं। त्यस्तो अवस्थामा, payment processing का लागि हामी third-party services (जस्तै payment processors) प्रयोग गर्छौं। हामी तपाईंको payment card details store वा collect गर्नेछैनौं। त्यो information सिधै हाम्रो third-party payment processors लाई प्रदान गरिन्छ, र उनीहरूले तपाईंको personal information प्रयोग गर्ने तरिका उनीहरूको Privacy Policy द्वारा governed हुन्छ। यी payment processors Visa, Mastercard, American Express, र Discover जस्ता brands को संयुक्त प्रयास PCI Security Standards Council द्वारा managed PCI-DSS standards पालना गर्छन्। PCI-DSS requirements ले payment information को secure handling सुनिश्चित गर्न मद्दत गर्छ।

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: हामी आफ्नो sole discretion मा, कुनै पनि कारणका लागि र कुनै limitation बिना, Terms को breach लगायत तर त्यतिमै सीमित नरही, prior notice वा liability बिना तपाईंको account terminate वा suspend गर्न र Service access रोक्न सक्छौं। तपाईं आफ्नो account terminate गर्न चाहनुहुन्छ भने Service प्रयोग गर्न बन्द गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। Terms का जुन provisions आफ्नो nature अनुसार termination पछि पनि survive गर्नुपर्ने हो, ती termination पछि पनि survive हुनेछन्, जसमा ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity, र limitations of liability समावेश छन् तर त्यतिमै सीमित छैनन्।

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: हामी समय-समयमा हाम्रो Privacy Policy update गर्न सक्छौं। नयाँ Privacy Policy यो page मा post गरेर हामी तपाईंलाई कुनै पनि changes बारे notify गर्नेछौं। change effective हुनु अघि email र/वा हाम्रो Service मा prominent notice मार्फत जानकारी दिनेछौं र यो Privacy Policy को माथि रहेको “effective date” update गर्नेछौं। कुनै changes का लागि यो Privacy Policy समय-समयमा review गर्न तपाईंलाई सल्लाह दिइन्छ। यो Privacy Policy का changes यो page मा post हुँदा effective हुन्छन्।

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: तपाईंले हाम्रो Service visit गरेपछि third party websites मा तपाईंलाई advertise गर्न हामी remarketing services प्रयोग गर्न सक्छौं। हामी र हाम्रो third-party vendors ले हाम्रो Service मा तपाईंका past visits का आधारमा ads inform, optimise, र serve गर्न cookies प्रयोग गर्छौं।

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: हामी हाम्रो Service को development process automate गर्न third-party Service Providers प्रयोग गर्न सक्छौं।

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: हामी हाम्रो Service को प्रयोग monitor र analyze गर्न third-party Service Providers प्रयोग गर्न सक्छौं।

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: हाम्रो Service support र maintain गर्न मद्दतका लागि तपाईंलाई advertisements देखाउन हामी third-party Service Providers प्रयोग गर्न सक्छौं।

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: हामी आफ्नो sole discretion मा notice बिना हाम्रो Service तथा Service मार्फत प्रदान गर्ने कुनै service वा material withdraw वा amend गर्ने अधिकार राख्छौं। कुनै पनि कारणले Service को सबै वा कुनै भाग कुनै पनि समय वा अवधिका लागि unavailable भएमा हामी liable हुने छैनौं। समय-समयमा, हामी registered users सहित users का लागि Service का केही parts वा पूरा Service मा access restrict गर्न सक्छौं।

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: हामी अरूहरूको intellectual property rights सम्मान गर्छौं। Service मा post गरिएको Content ले कुनै व्यक्ति वा entity को copyright वा अन्य intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) उल्लङ्घन गरेको भन्ने कुनै claim आएमा respond गर्नु हाम्रो policy हो। तपाईं copyright owner हुनुहुन्छ वा owner को behalf मा authorized हुनुहुन्छ, र copyrighted work copyright infringement हुने गरी copy गरिएको विश्वास गर्नुहुन्छ भने, कृपया subject line: “Copyright Infringement” सहित support@inspir.app मा email मार्फत आफ्नो claim submit गर्नुहोस्, र तल “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” अन्तर्गत उल्लेख गरेझैं alleged Infringement को detailed description समावेश गर्नुहोस्। Service मा र/वा Service मार्फत भेटिएको कुनै Content ले तपाईंको copyright infringed गरेको भन्ने misrepresentation वा bad-faith claims का लागि तपाईं damages (costs र attorneys’ fees सहित) का लागि accountable हुन सक्नुहुन्छ।

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: हामी हाम्रो Service मा activity track गर्न cookies र similar tracking technologies प्रयोग गर्छौं र केही information राख्छौं। Cookies सानो amount data भएका files हुन्, जसमा anonymous unique identifier समावेश हुन सक्छ। Cookies website बाट तपाईंको browser मा पठाइन्छन् र तपाईंको device मा stored हुन्छन्। information collect र track गर्न तथा हाम्रो Service improve र analyze गर्न beacons, tags, र scripts जस्ता अन्य tracking technologies पनि प्रयोग गरिन्छ। तपाईं आफ्नो browser लाई सबै cookies refuse गर्न वा cookie पठाइँदा indicate गर्न instruct गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। तर cookies accept गर्नुभएन भने हाम्रो Service का केही portions प्रयोग गर्न नसक्नु हुन सक्छ। हामीले प्रयोग गर्ने Cookies का examples: Session Cookies: हामी हाम्रो Service operate गर्न Session Cookies प्रयोग गर्छौं। Preference Cookies: तपाईंका preferences र विभिन्न settings सम्झन Preference Cookies प्रयोग गर्छौं। Security Cookies: security purposes का लागि Security Cookies प्रयोग गर्छौं। Advertising Cookies: तपाईं र तपाईंका interests सँग relevant हुन सक्ने advertisements serve गर्न Advertising Cookies प्रयोग गरिन्छ।

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: हामी आफ्नो ग्रहभन्दा बाहिर पुगेका छौं। तर सबैभन्दा छिटो र महत्वपूर्ण प्रगति communication र technology मा भयो, जसले 3 billion भन्दा बढी मानिसको global population लाई जोडेको छ।

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: हामी तपाईंको Personal Data यो Privacy Policy मा उल्लेखित purposes का लागि आवश्यक भएसम्म मात्र retain गर्नेछौं। हाम्रो legal obligations पालना गर्न (उदाहरणका लागि applicable laws पालना गर्न data retain गर्नुपर्ने भए), disputes resolve गर्न, र legal agreements तथा policies enforce गर्न आवश्यक हदसम्म तपाईंको Personal Data retain र use गर्नेछौं। हामी internal analysis purposes का लागि Usage Data पनि retain गर्नेछौं। Usage Data सामान्यतया shorter period का लागि retain हुन्छ, तर यो data security strengthen गर्न वा हाम्रो Service को functionality improve गर्न प्रयोग हुँदा, वा हामी legally यो data longer time periods का लागि retain गर्न obligated हुँदा exception हुन सक्छ।

entries.source: Welcome to Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”)! These Terms of Service (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) govern your use of our website located atwww.inspir.appand applications available on app stores (together or individually “Service”) operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Our Privacy Policy also governs your use of our Service and explains how we collect, safeguard and disclose information that results from your use of our web pages. The privacy policy is available at inspir.app/privacy Your agreement with us includes these Terms and our Privacy Policy (“Agreements”). You acknowledge that you have read and understood the Agreements, and agree to be bound of them. If you do not agree with (or cannot comply with) Agreements, then you may not use the Service, but please let us know by emailing support@inspir.appso we can try to find a solution. These Terms apply to all visitors, users and others who wish to access or use the Service.
entries.value: Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) (“Company”, “we”, “our”, “us”) मा स्वागत छ! यी Terms of Service (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) द्वारा operated www.inspir.app मा रहेको हाम्रो website र app stores मा उपलब्ध applications (एकसाथ वा अलग-अलग “Service”) को तपाईंको प्रयोग governed गर्छन्। हाम्रो Privacy Policy ले पनि हाम्रो Service को तपाईंको प्रयोग governed गर्छ र तपाईंको web pages प्रयोगबाट उत्पन्न information हामी कसरी collect, safeguard, र disclose गर्छौं भनेर explains गर्छ। privacy policy inspir.app/privacy मा उपलब्ध छ। हामीसँगको तपाईंको agreement मा यी Terms र हाम्रो Privacy Policy (“Agreements”) समावेश छन्। तपाईंले Agreements पढ्नुभएको र बुझ्नुभएको acknowledge गर्नुहुन्छ, र तिनबाट bound हुन सहमत हुनुहुन्छ। तपाईं Agreements सँग agree गर्नुहुन्न (वा comply गर्न सक्नुहुन्न) भने Service प्रयोग गर्न सक्नुहुन्न, तर समाधान खोज्न हामी प्रयास गर्न सकौं भनेर support@inspir.app मा email गरी हामीलाई जानकारी दिनुहोस्। यी Terms Service access वा use गर्न चाहने सबै visitors, users, र others मा लागू हुन्छन्।

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: तपाईं हामीसँग account बनाउँदा, तपाईंले प्रदान गरेको information सधैं accurate, complete, र current छ भनेर guarantee गर्नुहुन्छ। inaccurate, incomplete, वा obsolete information ले Service मा तपाईंको account को immediate termination गराउन सक्छ। तपाईं आफ्नो account र password को confidentiality कायम राख्न जिम्मेवार हुनुहुन्छ, जसमा आफ्नो computer र/वा account मा access restriction पनि समावेश छ तर त्यतिमै सीमित छैन। तपाईंको account र/वा password अन्तर्गत हुने कुनै पनि र सबै activities वा actions को responsibility accept गर्न सहमत हुनुहुन्छ, चाहे तपाईंको password हाम्रो Service सँग होस् वा third-party service सँग। security breach वा तपाईंको account को unauthorized use थाहा पाउनेबित्तिकै हामीलाई तुरुन्त notify गर्नुपर्छ। तपाईं username का रूपमा अर्को person वा entity को name, वा lawfully use गर्न उपलब्ध नभएको name, वा तपाईं बाहेक अन्य person वा entity को rights अन्तर्गत पर्ने name वा trademark, appropriate authorization बिना प्रयोग गर्न सक्नुहुन्न। offensive, vulgar, वा obscene कुनै name username का रूपमा प्रयोग गर्न सक्नुहुन्न। हामी आफ्नो sole discretion मा service refuse गर्ने, accounts terminate गर्ने, content remove वा edit गर्ने, वा orders cancel गर्ने अधिकार राख्छौं।

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: तपाईंले AI मा notes paste गर्दा, broad ideas लाई ती jobs मा split गर्न भन्नुहोस्। प्रत्येकमा पूरा paragraph भएको 5 giant cards भएको deck भन्दा 18 specific cards भएको deck सामान्यतया राम्रो हुन्छ।

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: हाम्रो Service प्रयोग गर्दा, हामी निम्न information पनि collect गर्न सक्छौं: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence र actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements सम्बन्धी documents का details, bonuses र compensation सम्बन्धी information, marital status, family members, social security (वा अन्य taxpayer identification) number, office location, र अन्य data। Payment Data। तपाईंले purchases गर्नुभयो भने payment process गर्न आवश्यक data collect गर्न सक्छौं, जस्तै payment instrument number (जस्तै credit card number), र तपाईंको payment instrument सँग सम्बन्धित security code। सबै payment data Razorpay द्वारा stored हुन्छ। उनीहरूको privacy notice link(s) यहाँ भेट्न सक्नुहुन्छ: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: हाम्रो Service प्रयोग गर्दा, हामी तपाईंलाई contact गर्न वा identify गर्न प्रयोग गर्न सकिने केही personally identifiable information (“Personal Data”) provide गर्न भन्न सक्छौं। Personally identifiable information मा समावेश हुन सक्छ, तर त्यतिमै सीमित छैन: Student र Parent को email address, Student र Parent को first name र last name, Student र Parent को phone number, address, country, state, province, ZIP/Postal code, city, school name, class, cookies र Usage Data। हामी तपाईंको Data newsletters, marketing वा promotional materials, र तपाईंलाई रुचि लाग्न सक्ने अन्य information पठाउन contact गर्न प्रयोग गर्न सक्छौं। unsubscribe link follow गरेर तपाईं हामीबाट आउने यी communications मध्ये कुनै वा सबैबाट opt-out गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ। Usage Data: तपाईं हाम्रो Service visit गर्दा वा कुनै device द्वारा वा मार्फत Service access गर्दा तपाईंको browser ले पठाउने information पनि हामी collect गर्न सक्छौं (“Usage Data”)। यो Usage Data मा तपाईंको computer को Internet Protocol address (जस्तै IP address), browser type, browser version, तपाईंले visit गर्ने हाम्रो Service का pages, visit को time र date, ती pages मा spent time, unique device identifiers, र अन्य diagnostic data जस्ता information समावेश हुन सक्छ। तपाईं device बाट Service access गर्दा, यो Usage Data मा तपाईंले प्रयोग गर्ने device type, तपाईंको device unique ID, तपाईंको device को IP address, तपाईंको device operating system, तपाईंले प्रयोग गर्ने Internet browser type, unique device identifiers, र अन्य diagnostic data जस्ता information समावेश हुन सक्छ।

entries.source: World capitals

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: World History सबै समयमा picture बाट zoom out गरेजस्तै भएको छ, एउटा निरन्तर बदलिइरहने picture। 19th century अघिका centuries ले human history मा turning point चिन्हित गरे, जब world flat र limited view बाट new territories र colonies को बढ्दो understanding तर्फ सर्दै गयो। French Revolution पहिलो पटक थियो जब ठूलो population protest गर्न र liberty, equality, र fraternity का ideals establish गर्न भेला भयो। World War II का events ले पनि अर्को century का लागि world shape गरे र 21st century को foundation राखे।

entries.value: xTracking Cookies Data (tracking cookies data)

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: हो, तर recommended workflow hint-first हो। final answer copy गर्नुको सट्टा method बुझ्न, आफ्नो work check गर्न, र errors review गर्न यसको प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: हो, जब यसले सङ्केत दिन्छ, reasoning जाँच्छ, गल्ती व्याख्या गर्छ, र तपाईंका लागि लेख्नुको सट्टा अन्तिम उत्तर तपाईंलाई बनाउन लगाउँछ।

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: हो। {value1} {value2} मा public guest learning mode का रूपमा खुल्छ, त्यसैले account बनाउनुअघि केही free guest messages बाट सुरु गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ।

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: हो। राम्रो workflow भनेको trusted lesson source बाट foundation सिक्नु, त्यसपछि follow-up questions सोध्न, recall practice गर्न, misconceptions repair गर्न, र अर्को review के गर्ने plan बनाउन inspir प्रयोग गर्नु हो।

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: हो। school ले public modes test गरेर सुरु गर्न सक्छ, त्यसपछि use case, content needs, र funding path स्पष्ट हुँदा pilot वा tailored deployment तर्फ जान सक्छ।

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: हो। Audience pages ले public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, र AI-readable discovery files मात्र link गर्छन्। Private saved chats excluded नै रहन्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: हो। Category pages public guest modes, learning paths, र article clusters मा link गर्छन् ताकि learners reading बाट tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, वा feedback तर्फ जान सकून्।

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: हो। Code Tutor ले concepts explain गर्न, examples walkthrough गर्न, behavior predict गर्न लगाउन, र learning लाई copy-paste मा नबदलिकन practice गर्न मद्दत गर्न सक्छ।

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: हो। Exam Prep Planner ले तपाईंका topics, date, र available time लाई practice र review सहितको practical revision sequence मा बदल्न सक्छ।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: हो। Public guest modes ले teachers लाई custom deployment discuss गर्नुअघि learning behavior test गर्न दिन्छ।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: हो। Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, र writing feedback जस्ता public guest modes सिधै खुल्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: हो। Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, र flashcards जस्ता public guest modes canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs बाट सिधै खुल्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: हो। Public mode URLs guest mode मा सिधै खुल्छन् ताकि learner तुरुन्तै सुरु गर्न सकोस्, त्यसपछि saved history वा बढी usage चाहियो भने पछि account बनाउन सक्छ।

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: हो। Public modes school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, र personal study routines का लागि काम गर्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: हो। Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes र flashcards जस्ता सार्वजनिक topic chats सिधै guest mode मा खुल्छन्।

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: हो। /chat/learn-anything र /chat/socratic-instruction जस्ता public topic entrypoints indexable learning pages हुनका लागि हुन्।

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: हो। Quiz, Flashcard Builder, र Spaced Review active recall र mistake repair का लागि बनाइएका public modes हुन्।

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: हो। Reading Companion ले passages सरल बनाउन, questions सोध्न, vocabulary explain गर्न, र main claim तथा supporting evidence पहिचान गर्न मद्दत गर्न सक्छ।
